name: Round Steak Smothered in Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round steak, cut into 4 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag, mix together flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the round steak pieces to the flour mixture and shake to coat evenly.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Brown the meat for about 4-5 minutes on each side until browned.
4. Remove the meat from the skillet using tongs or a spatula.
5. Sprinkle the pan drippings with 3 tablespoons of flour and stir constantly until the flour browns, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Slowly add water to the pan, stirring constantly, until the gravy thickens.
7. Add onions, tomatoes, vinegar, and parsley flakes to the gravy.
8. Return the meat to the skillet. Cover and simmer for 1 hour or until tender.
